dataList.name: [Season 4] 3★ Guarantee Decaextraction Ticket
dataList.desc: Can be used to perform 10 extractions where one 3★ Identity from [Season 4] is guaranteed to appear.
dataList.flavor: A special ticket with a mark on it. It can extract an Identity from a world of unlikely possibilities with certainty. The paper is fiercely beating и pulsing.

dataList.name: [Season 4] Egoshard Crate
dataList.flavor:
Egoshards were randomly harvested и stored in these boxes. Its contents are a mystery.
Когда you hold one in a quiet place, you can hear small fusses.

dataList.name: [Season 4] Nominable Egoshard Crate
dataList.desc: Open to receive 1-3 Egoshards of a Sinner of choice.
dataList.flavor:
A crate that yields Egoshards of a Sinner you choose.
According to Эпштейн, its contents are determined once a manager makes their decision.

dataList.name: [Season 4] Саня’s Egoshard
dataList.desc: Used for purchasing Саня’s Айдишки, Э.Г.О, и Thread from the Dispenser.
dataList.flavor:
Fleeting moments from any point within the Sinner’s lifetime, condensed в physical form. The shards float in the air.
Possibilities are transient things; they drift in the realm of uncertainty unless seized.
